messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0071",
  "title": "运营、商业化与社区",
  "page_index": 28,
  "page_range": "28"
}

Section text:
运营、商业化与社区

message.content: This section functions as a structural heading indicating coverage of three primary topics: operations, commercialization, and community. It can answer high-level navigational questions regarding where the document addresses operational management, monetization strategies, and community engagement. The provided excerpt contains no specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types, and therefore cannot answer detailed factual, procedural, or data-driven queries without additional content.
